issues.description: The seed-link URL (https://github.com/rootspec/demos/blob/main/greenfield/SEED.md) is not traceable to SEED.md. SEED.md says link to SEED.md and spec files in the GitHub repo but provides no repository URL. The org/repo name 'rootspec/demos' does not appear anywhere in SEED.md or the spec.
issues.expected: A URL verifiably traceable to SEED.md or an authoritative spec document
issues.actual: Hardcoded https://github.com/rootspec/demos/blob/main/greenfield/SEED.md — 'rootspec/demos' is not confirmed by any spec or seed document
issues.suggestion: Verify the correct GitHub repository URL and update MetaBanner.astro lines 2-3 with the real repo path

issues.description: The GitHub CTA links (https://github.com/rootspec/rootspec) used in HeroSection.astro, CTASection.astro, and index.astro are not traceable to SEED.md. SEED.md specifies linking to 'the GitHub repo' and mentions getting started instructions, but provides no repository URL. 'rootspec/rootspec' does not appear anywhere in SEED.md or spec files.
issues.expected: A verified GitHub URL from SEED.md or the spec
issues.actual: Hardcoded https://github.com/rootspec/rootspec — repo name not confirmed by any spec or seed document
issues.suggestion: Verify the correct GitHub repository URL and update all three files (HeroSection.astro:17, CTASection.astro:21, index.astro:32) accordingly

issues.description: US-104 tests [data-test=cta-github] and passes because that attribute exists in HeroSection.astro:17 — not in the CTA section. CTASection.astro uses data-test='cta-github-section' on its GitHub link. The story narrative says 'scroll to the open source CTA section' but the test selector resolves to the hero button, not the CTA section. The CTA section's GitHub link is de facto untested by the story it's meant to satisfy.
issues.expected: data-test='cta-github' on the primary GitHub link in CTASection.astro so the CTA-section button is what the story validates
issues.actual: CTASection.astro uses data-test='cta-github-section'; only HeroSection.astro has data-test='cta-github'
issues.suggestion: Change data-test='cta-github-section' to data-test='cta-github' in CTASection.astro:20 (or add the attribute alongside the existing one)

issues.description: The generated skeleton spec jumps from L1 (Philosophy) directly to L3 (Core Interaction) and L5 (User Story), skipping L2 (Truths). SEED.md specifies the output should show 'how their input maps to L1-L3'. The pillars selected by the user are placed under L1 instead of being framed as L2 Truths/principles.
issues.expected: Skeleton spec output covering L1 (Philosophy/Mission), L2 (Truths derived from pillars), and L3 (Interaction) per SEED.md's 'showing how their input maps to L1-L3'
issues.actual: generateSpec() in SpecWizard.tsx produces L1 (with pillars listed under it), L3, and L5 — L2 Truths level is absent, and L5 was not part of SEED.md's described wizard output
issues.suggestion: Update generateSpec() to produce a proper L2 section using the selected pillars as Truths/principles, and consider whether L5 belongs in the output given SEED.md says L1-L3 only

issues.description: The theme toggle emoji spans (☀️ and 🌙) lack aria-hidden='true'. Screen readers may announce both the emoji character name and the button's aria-label, producing redundant or confusing output (e.g. 'sun Switch to dark mode'). The aria-label on the button itself is correct and updates on toggle.
issues.expected: Emoji icon spans should be aria-hidden='true' to prevent redundant screen reader announcements. 03.INTERACTIONS.md requires the toggle to 'announce state change to screen readers' cleanly.
issues.suggestion: Add aria-hidden='true' to both .theme-icon spans in Header.astro lines 20-21

issues.description: The wizard output step has no copy-to-clipboard button. 03.INTERACTIONS.md Loop 4 explicitly states the output is copyable: 'copy action copies full text'. The acceptance criteria only check for wizard-output existence, so the test passes, but the copy feature is not present.
issues.expected: A 'Copy' button on the wizard output step that copies the full skeleton spec text to the clipboard
issues.actual: Only a 'Start over' button is present; no copy mechanism exists
issues.suggestion: Add a copy-to-clipboard button using navigator.clipboard.writeText() in the output step of SpecWizard.tsx

notes.content: Deducted 10 points for two unverifiable GitHub URLs (REV-001, REV-002) — meta-banner links and CTA GitHub link not traceable to SEED.md
notes.visual: Full marks — no placeholder text, no literal icon text, no broken layout, all sections render correctly with real content
notes.alignment: Deducted 10 points for CTA story (US-104) resolving against hero selector instead of CTA section (REV-003). Deducted 5 for wizard spec output missing L2 level (REV-004)
notes.accessibility: Minor deduction for emoji without aria-hidden on theme toggle icons (REV-005). The button aria-label is correct and updates dynamically.
notes.polish: Deducted 5 for missing copy feature explicitly called out in interaction architecture (REV-006)
